programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Trip to Jordan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo clash over their school show poster-Zoe colors while Milo writes the title. Alim suggests writing from the right, surprising them. In Jordan, they meet Souria preparing a puppet show and learn to write Arabic... from right to left!

programme.title: The Bare Bird Bath
programme.desc: Kea's bird bath keeps running out of water, and after investigating the problem, Darwin and Newts discover that it's evaporating in the sun.

programme.title: Mystery of the Headless Haunter
programme.desc: Addison has to solve the mystery of what's making scary sounds after Donnie convinces the other kids on an Ayrton Rangers camping trip that a mythical spook called the Headless Haunter is wandering through the park.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Maleficent Mosquitoes
programme.desc: When swarms of mosquitoes mysteriously descend on the park, the kids' summer movie night is in danger of being cancelled unless Addison and her friends can figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Scooped!
programme.desc: When Addison and her classmates get a school assignment to write about local news – and the news is that laundry is going missing from balconies around Ayrton Park – Addison turns into investigative reporter to crack the case and get a scoop.

programme.title: Coffee Filter
programme.desc: Who says coffee is the only thing filters are used for? See how we turn this day to day object into something fun.

programme.title: Crayon
programme.desc: Colouring isn't the only thing these crayons are good at! Join Hepi and Briko as they blow your mind with creative and colourful DIYs

programme.title: Silly Laws
programme.desc: Pessi decided to put their cloud up for sale because they don't deserve its good view. The silly laws forbid them from being happy. But Pessi wrote the laws himself. Now, Sprinter and Leo must try to convince him to rewrite the laws so he and Opti can be happy again.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Bee - Another Brick in the Wall
programme.desc: The bee is commissioned to build a honeycomb. However, it is more difficult than he expected as he was not paying attention when they showed him how it has to be done. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Can Slime Think?
programme.desc: Slime mould are cleverer than they look even though they don't have eyes, a skeleton, a nervous system, or even a brain. They are single-celled organisms. There are more than 900 species of them all over the world.

programme.title: Feeling Nervous!
programme.desc: Find out how fast your nerves work when Dr. Xand blows a fuse in the lab with a new underpants experiment! Plus, the doctors have discovered a secret button in the Cupboard of Everything that turns it into a time machine!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Bus
programme.desc: Henry meets a red bus in London. Bus has lots of tourists arriving for a tour but his driver has gotten stuck in traffic.

programme.title: Atlantic Puffin
programme.desc: Franky thinks the puffins on TV must be robots, and Tiny Owl worries that he might not be the cutest critter in town anymore as Mommy and Daddy fall in love with the puffins on TV. Grandad Badger tells Binah about the time he was a circus clown.

programme.title: Feeling Nervous!
programme.desc: Find out how fast your nerves work when Dr. Xand blows a fuse in the lab with a new underpants experiment! Plus, the doctors have discovered a secret button in the Cupboard of Everything that turns it into a time machine!

programme.title: Can Slime Think?
programme.desc: Slime mould are cleverer than they look even though they don't have eyes, a skeleton, a nervous system, or even a brain. They are single-celled organisms. There are more than 900 species of them all over the world.

programme.title: Super Skin and Body Tricks
programme.desc: The doctors show how amazing the skin is at protecting the body, and demonstrate a cool body trick. In the emergency room, there's a patient with a very peculiar broken arm, and another with a nasty burn on her foot.

programme.title: This is Where it Starts
programme.desc: It's the Artistic British Championships. Alice is facing strong competition as she is up against Amelie and Phoebe's teammates from the European Championships. Meanwhile, Ekraj is late for podium training and doesn't seem focused on the competition.

programme.title: Double Emergency
programme.desc: There's a double emergency at the Vet School. Edward, the ferret, is seriously ill, having stopped eating, and a sick cow with a mystery illness needs investigating. Can the Junior Vets cope when things go wrong?

programme.title: Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: When an iceberg brings an emperor penguin and his egg into the Bay, Darwin and Newts help him get home.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle & Roll
programme.desc: Shake, Rattle & Roll is a Filipino horror anthology film composed of three standalone stories, each inspired by local folklore and supernatural beliefs

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

E11
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E1 - It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal – however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances. Back to basics. It’s going to be a true slug-match to see who has the skills and who has the drive to take the one thing that has eluded them all… the title of Top Chef! Padma Lakshmi, Tom Colicchio, and Gail Simmons return as judges and joining them as the first guest judge of the season is legendary Chef, Jeremiah Tower. Marcus Samuelsson, Nancy Silverton, Michael Cimarusti, Josiah Citrin, Suzanne Goin, Caroline Styne share the table for the high-powered, high-stress beach-side meal.

programme.title: E2 - I Wish I Knew Where To Start
programme.desc: A wish involving a librarian, a treasure map and a new perspective all help Ruby discover that her love of helping others comes from her late mom.

programme.title: E10 - Uncle Grandpa Ate My Homework!
programme.desc: When Uncle Grandpa shows up and mistakenly eats a kid's Egyptian diorama for school, he helps the kid bring an actual pyramid to class!

programme.title: E1 - It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal – however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances. Back to basics. It’s going to be a true slug-match to see who has the skills and who has the drive to take the one thing that has eluded them all… the title of Top Chef! Padma Lakshmi, Tom Colicchio, and Gail Simmons return as judges and joining them as the first guest judge of the season is legendary Chef, Jeremiah Tower. Marcus Samuelsson, Nancy Silverton, Michael Cimarusti, Josiah Citrin, Suzanne Goin, Caroline Styne share the table for the high-powered, high-stress beach-side meal.

programme.desc: Gran Gran and JoJo are excited to bake a batch of Great Gran Gran's signature Saint Lucian banana bread, but there's a problem - they don't know how long to bake it for!

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E16 - Mariana Trench: The Pacific Ocean
programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger.

programme.title: E17 - Broccoli
programme.desc: It's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.title: E52 - Broccoli's Movie Night
programme.desc: Broccoli screens Supertato: The Movie, but Evil Pea has plans to change the story.

programme.title: E1 - The Tato Team
programme.desc: During the Veggies' Super Sidekick Costume Contest, Evil Pea traps Supertato in a jar of honey. All is lost until the Veggies become real super sidekicks, the Tato Team!

programme.title: E95 - Tiddlytubby Party
programme.desc: Tinky Winky finds a party invitation and shows it to Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. The invitation takes flight and the Teletubbies follow it to find a Tiddlytubbies' party.

programme.title: E9 - Lizard
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'lizard' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today we see a green lizard, a bright lizard, a long-tailed lizard, a running lizard and a climbing lizard.

programme.title: E19 - Rusty Robot
programme.desc: When Stan Tall starts to develop rust, it's up to Messy to help.

programme.title: E9 - Pirate Parade
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: E6 - Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E31 - Go Jet Academy: Lightning Bolt Blackout
programme.desc: When lightning strikes Academy Island, it causes a power cut. Can the Go Jetters rescue their trapped friends without the power they need to call for Click-ons?

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E26 - The Obstacle Course Badge
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: E25 - The Going Slow Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: E37 - Kinderdijk, Netherlands
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E3 - Crowded Seas
programme.desc: Dip into North America’s southern coastal waters, where opalescent squid mate, sea turtles nest, and mobula rays take flight for the sake of romance. Fly a specialized drone with Lizzie as she swoops in for a breath sample from a blue whale.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E4 - Joined at the Hip
programme.desc: The animal kingdom can be a harsh place, but some baby animals have a family ready to take care of their needs. Meet some of these adorable babies and their clans: a koala joey, European elk twins, a litter of Asian short-clawed otters, and black howler monkey youngsters.

programme.title: E1 - The Rescuers
programme.desc: Dogs around the world come to the rescue in surprising ways. Some search for survivors when disaster strikes or rescue animals from poachers and wildlife traffickers. Others help us in times of trouble—both on land and in the water.

programme.title: E2 - The Lifesavers
programme.desc: Meet a border collie that protects aircraft from lethal bird strikes, a sprocker spaniel whose sense of smell is saving imperilled water voles, and an Anatolian shepherd that helps conserve Africa’s most endangered big cat, the cheetah.

programme.title: E5 - Badalo is Missing
programme.desc: Watch the Onçafari team get to know Aroeira, their newly collared female, and take a peek at Aurora’s cub, Apolo. Continue to track Badalo, who has moved deeper into the flooded forest, where he puts Lizzie’s game-changing research in jeopardy.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E4 - The Southern Drylands
programme.desc: The Southern Drylands is a journey into the most arid and extreme environments in the furthest reaches of southern Africa. We go to spectacular but treacherous places where almost no rain falls, to find incredibly resilient creatures and learn the secrets to their survival. From the largest mammals to the fastest insects and even a ghost-like fish found nowhere else in the world, the Southern Drylands contain some extraordinary inhabitants, all connected by the daily challenges of living in some of most inhospitable habitats in the world.

programme.title: E236 - The Monsters In Your Head/Ye Olde Laser Duel/Ben Again And Again/Vote Zombozo/De-Fang
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen learn a rumor of an alien invasion happening at the park they are camping at, but when they investigate, they discover a preserve containing a host of mutated creatures engineered by Animo!

programme.title: E304 - Lemming Fortune/Tough Medicine/Tai Chi Lemmings/Domestic Shaolin/Peaceable Enemies/Th
programme.desc: When Grizzy propels the Lemmings out of the log cabin perched on the Great Wall of China, the critters land on a small traditional house in a bamboo forest.

programme.title: E113 - Cat-Titude Adjustment/Pinch Hitter/Fight In The Museum/Kitten Grifters/School Of Hard
programme.desc: Tom’s being unusually difficult when he’s rocked by an epiphany-- HE’S LOSING HIS HAIR!

programme.title: E435 - A Case Of Mistaken Identity/Arctic Adventure/Giant Lamput
programme.desc: It's a perfect evening. Droopy has finished his day at work and Thief has successfully completed his art heist. But an accident with Lamput causes their briefcases to be swapped.

programme.title: E69 - The Sale/The Routine/The Parking/The Upgrade/The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: E119 - A Sumoful Mind/Animal Day
programme.desc: When Jeff realizes Sumo's new classes have been rubbing off on Sumo, he attempts to further foster this newfound intellectual Sumo! But will Clarence's lowbrow antics reverse Jeff's hard work?

programme.title: E435 - Train Trouble/Blown Away
programme.desc: Mr Bean loses his ticket on a train ride and has to spend the journey hiding from the inspector.

programme.title: E167 - Feather Of The Bride/ Daffy Magician: Pick A Card/ Bugs Hole Gags 2: Rattlesnakes/Poo
programme.desc: Foghorn Leghorn attempts to charm his future father-in-law. Daffy does a card trick. Elmer discovers a scaly surprise.

programme.title: E86 - Too Short To Ride/Drop Beat Dad
programme.desc: Steven and Amethyst take a trip to Funland but run into trouble when their friend is too short to ride the rollercoasters.

programme.title: Why China Is Surging Its Nuclear Forces
programme.desc: For decades China kept a minimal nuclear force. Now it's rapidly expanding under Xi Jinping. DW explores why Beijing is building a vast arsenal of missiles and warheads. What conflicts may China be preparing for?

programme.title: Is It Still Okay To Love The King Of Pop? | Michael Jackson Explained
programme.desc: Michael Jackson: One of the most influential artists of all time. A musical genius, cultural icon and the undisputed King of Pop. Yet that legacy comes with controversy, allegations and unanswered questions.

programme.title: Starving Penguins: South Africa's Iconic Species In Crisis
programme.desc: Overfishing and climate change are pushing South Africa's African penguins toward extinction. On Colombia's Santa Cruz del Islote, nearly 1,000 people live on one hectare. Singapore shows how religious tolerance can work.

programme.title: Is It Still Okay To Love The King Of Pop? | Michael Jackson Explained
programme.desc: Michael Jackson: One of the most influential artists of all time. A musical genius, cultural icon and the undisputed King of Pop. Yet that legacy comes with controversy, allegations and unanswered questions.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander
programme.desc: The axolotl, a tailed amphibian, is a marvel of evolution. It can regenerate injured body parts and is exceptionally long-lived. However, the axolotl is only found in Mexico, and its habitat is disappearing.

programme.desc: Michael Jackson: One of the most influential artists of all time. A musical genius, cultural icon and the undisputed King of Pop. Yet that legacy comes with controversy, allegations and unanswered questions.

programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Based on the popular period novel series by Saeki Yasuhide, this drama follows Sakazaki Iwane, a gifted swordsman known for his calm grace. Once a samurai of the Bungo Sekimae domain, he abandons his clan after a tragic incident and lives as a ronin in Edo. Portrayed by Yamamoto Koji, Iwane is a gentle and compassionate warrior who upholds justice, in a richly entertaining period series filled with swordplay, romance, human drama, and humor.

programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi, a young and principled lawyer, stands tall against legal corruption and social injustice, determined to uncover truth and defend the innocent, no matter the cost.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E778
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5148
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E210 - Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn’t trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: E210 - Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn’t trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: E117 - Caved In
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte, and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: E405 - Brawl In The Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: E205 - iStage An Intervention
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: E101 - Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: E208 - The Night Ninja Returns
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: E115 - Taken to the Cleaners / Mugshot
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on an undercover mission to find out why items of laundry are going missing at the Dry Cleaners. // In an unfortunate case of mistaken identity, Best has been mistaken for the notorious jewel thief, Jimmy Muggins.

programme.title: E105 - Save the Date
programme.desc: Max bets Phoebe she can't turn off being a superhero and go on a normal date. Chloe helps Phoebe do well on the date, but Max tries to sabotage it by crying wolf. Suddenly, a real supervillain emerges and puts Max and Chloe in serious danger.

programme.title: E408 - Can't Hardly Wait / A Mutt Above
programme.desc: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E402 - Ice Cream Headache
programme.desc: The Ice Cream Man and Ice Cream King team up to capture a mysterious ice cream eating beast.

programme.title: E322 - Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up. // When Lori finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play, she develops the yips.

programme.title: E252 - Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: The newly reformed 'Clean Bubble' takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E405 - Store Wars with the Casagrandes / Lucha Fever with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a fancy new grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete. // Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lubra Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: E101 - Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: E210 - The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: E310 - Something Stupid This Way Comes
programme.desc: Madame Hagfish shares tales of Pat-Tron, Pat the Hapless and Patgor.

programme.title: E624 - Day of the Dad / Small Blunder
programme.desc: Lori struggles to make a good impression on Bobby's dad after accidentally pushing him into a puddle. // Desperate to have the best show-and-tell in class, Lily takes Lisa's shrink ray to school.

programme.title: E625 - Fashion No Show / Doom Service
programme.desc: Leni and Carlota's working styles clash when they are both interning for a famous fashion designer, Mariella Moss. // The Louds book a stay at an all-inclusive resort, only to find the vacation is not what they imagined.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E2 - So Many Fun Questions to Ask!
programme.desc: Baby John has so many fun questions to ask! While playing in the garden, he asks his parents why some things are the way they are, like why his feet stink & why bubbles pop! Then, when Mom mistakenly takes his favorite hat to the laundry, he has to ask his family for help finding it. The questions continue as Jack & Jill help him figure out which of his toys will float or sink in the water.

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: Use your imagination at JJ's big pretend play dance party! Join Cody, Nina & Bella as they pretend to explore all sorts of fun places, from outer space to the bottom of the ocean. The fun continues as everyone learns how to do the robot dance to a beep-boop beat! Then, get into your pajamas for a slumber party where you can jump, wiggle & shuffle. With fun exercise moves & graceful ballet steps, it's a dance party where you can be anything you want!

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E1 - Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time, full of kittens, tutus & fun! The big day arrives when CeCe gets her very own adorable kitten! She loves her new friend & wants to put on a show, so she gets in her ballerina outfit to dance for her kitty. Then, after hosting many tea parties for her stuffed animals, CeCe invites her real friends JJ & Bella over for a high tea party! From ice skating with Mom to imagining stick ponies are unicorns, it's always a fun & graceful day with CeCe!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

E16 - The Maritime Saga Of The Barreau Brothers
programme.desc: The 'Grain de Sail' is a one-of-a-kind cargo sailboat. From Saint-Malo to New York, it transports 50 tons of wine, coffee and chocolate. Jacques and Olivier Barreau are behind this initiative and have chosen carbon-neutral maritime transport, all by the force of the wind.

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E16 - Lucille Boitelle/Gabriela Hearst/Mathieu Casseau
programme.desc: In the heart of Lyon, the Musee des Beaux-Arts houses 90,000 works of art. Lucille Boitelle is an ornamental painter who creates worlds that embellish any surface. Sensual and ethereal: the show by Uruguayan designer Gabriela Hearst. In Douarnenez, ceramist Mathieu Casseau handles clay with vigour and gentleness.

programme.title: E44 - In Bergerac (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Perigord caviar.

programme.title: E8 - In Search Of The Wild/Two Women And A Vacherin
programme.desc: Into the wild with Vincent, upholsterer by day and, for the rest of the time, wildlife film-maker, between the Jura and the Alps. Then we discover the secrets of Mont d'Or vacherin cheese in the Joux Valley, Switzerland. Close friends and artisans, Daniele and Marianne perfectly complement one another.

programme.title: E9 - Universities/Farmers/Comedy Club/Stuffed Cabbages
programme.desc: In the summary: should French universities ban political lectures; farmers are feeling the impact after the floods; a comedy club set up in a ski lift; a focus on the World Stuffed Cabbage Championships in Limoges...

programme.title: E5 - Community Spirit
programme.desc: Community spirit has always been important in farming. It is alive today, especially among the new generation which prefers a farming model that is based more on cooperation than competition.

programme.title: E1 - Delhi
programme.desc: New Delhi is home to breathtaking architecture, great food and the world's highest rate of traffic accidents!

programme.title: E1 - Food’s New Frontiers
programme.desc: Space foods, initially created just for astronauts, has now facilitated a revolution in agricultural and alternative food production. This revolution is changing the way we think about producing food in the future. In Finland, protein-rich foods are produced from thin air, making food production possible in a variety of environments, including deserts, cities, and even outer space. Scientists in the United States are working to make mushroom cultivation more sustainable, while in Austria, seeds are exposed to space radiation to improve their yield when grown back on Earth. A startup in Singapore is using space technology to enhance the security of livestock herds, and at NUS, a team has developed a remarkable hydrogel that makes crop cultivation more water-efficient.

programme.title: E2 - Food For Space Helps Planet Earth
programme.desc: How will research to live in space in the future benefit us on Earth today? In the Netherlands, we meet a team of researchers working with Martian and Lunar soil to grow crops and mealworms as food. In Thailand, scientists test the effects of varying gravity on the next superfood - watermeal. Meanwhile, an astounding transformation of agriculture is underway in Australia, with crop cultivation methods increasing output by 100%. With a cultivated beef firm in Israel racing to grow meat in space and a Singaporean company using microalgae to produce protein-rich foods, we learn how less is more for food production. Inspired by the similarity between disaster areas and outer space, a Japanese entrepreneur creates jellies to provide nutrition to earthquake victims and astronauts. As the space industry in Singapore grows, collaborations between countries and students’ interests in outer space deepen, leading to a transformation in space-for-humanity research.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: E7 - Laser vs. Super Epoxy
programme.desc: Episode 107 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Adapt Laser versus the Chemsol Randogrip supercoating; JetCat engine versus the Jet-O-Vator personal watercraft; and Power Post Driver versus the Baker Ballistics riot shield.

programme.title: E1 - Delhi
programme.desc: New Delhi is home to breathtaking architecture, great food and the world's highest rate of traffic accidents!

programme.title: E1 - Food’s New Frontiers
programme.desc: Space foods, initially created just for astronauts, has now facilitated a revolution in agricultural and alternative food production. This revolution is changing the way we think about producing food in the future. In Finland, protein-rich foods are produced from thin air, making food production possible in a variety of environments, including deserts, cities, and even outer space. Scientists in the United States are working to make mushroom cultivation more sustainable, while in Austria, seeds are exposed to space radiation to improve their yield when grown back on Earth. A startup in Singapore is using space technology to enhance the security of livestock herds, and at NUS, a team has developed a remarkable hydrogel that makes crop cultivation more water-efficient.

programme.title: E2 - Food For Space Helps Planet Earth
programme.desc: How will research to live in space in the future benefit us on Earth today? In the Netherlands, we meet a team of researchers working with Martian and Lunar soil to grow crops and mealworms as food. In Thailand, scientists test the effects of varying gravity on the next superfood - watermeal. Meanwhile, an astounding transformation of agriculture is underway in Australia, with crop cultivation methods increasing output by 100%. With a cultivated beef firm in Israel racing to grow meat in space and a Singaporean company using microalgae to produce protein-rich foods, we learn how less is more for food production. Inspired by the similarity between disaster areas and outer space, a Japanese entrepreneur creates jellies to provide nutrition to earthquake victims and astronauts. As the space industry in Singapore grows, collaborations between countries and students’ interests in outer space deepen, leading to a transformation in space-for-humanity research.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: E7 - Laser vs. Super Epoxy
programme.desc: Episode 107 of Showdown of the Unbeatables features Adapt Laser versus the Chemsol Randogrip supercoating; JetCat engine versus the Jet-O-Vator personal watercraft; and Power Post Driver versus the Baker Ballistics riot shield.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.title: The Monkey King 3
programme.desc: On the conflict-packed journey to the West for the scriptures, escorted by Sun, Bajie and Sha, Xuanzang, the Tang Priest, accidentally enters the Womanland of Western Liang, a mysterious nation where no men has ever been existed. The Queen falls for Xuanzang at first sight, without knowing what love is, thinking she could be terminally ill with incurable lovesickness. The Preceptor warns her that men are all poisonous creatures and orders to kill Xuanzang and his disciples. With the help of the Queen, the four flee the execution site, but later Xuanzang, Bajie and Sha carelessly drink the water from the Motherhood River that makes them pregnant rapidly. Wukong tries to save the three with his almighty transforming sorcery, when Xuanzang gradually loses his stand to falls in love with the Queen. The trespass of the four outsiders also agitates the God of River Oblivion, who completely breaks the peace of the Womanland. The River God floods the whole nation in a fury and puts i

programme.title: Grand Maison Paris
programme.desc: After their restaurant 'Grand Maison Tokyo' earned a Michelin three-star, Natsuki Obana and Rinko Hayami venture to Paris to open 'Grand Maison Paris,' aiming to become the first Asian chefs to achieve the same honor. However, they face cultural challenges and intense pressure in a city filled with culinary masters. Following a mishap at a gala dinner, Obana makes a pact with his former mentor: he will leave France if they don't earn three stars in the next Michelin evaluation. Can Obana and his team overcome these obstacles to achieve their dream?

programme.title: HK Stylized Thriller: Tales From The Occult: Ultimate Malevolence
programme.desc: “Killing Me Softly”- Magician Flora repeatedly sees illusions of her friend Maureen, who has gone missing since their last call. In an attempt to trace clues of Maureen's missing, Flora undergoes hypnosis to retrieve the memory of their conversation. Little does she know she is putting herself in danger. “No Way Out”- Ho wakes up from sleep and finds himself inside a mysterious industrial building. While looking for an exit, he bumps into corpses, phantoms, and even his ex-wife. He must find his way out before it's too late. “Memento Mori”- Two secondary school best friends, Tam and Yu, dream of becoming movie directors one day. In an accident, one unintentionally kills the other and becomes a director because of this incident.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.
